supersedes: 2026-06-03_22_links-to-graph-retrieval (custom-Cypher links expansion — dropped per native-only directive)
directive: User (2026-06-03): use LlamaIndex NATIVE retrieval strategies; do not build custom strategies; if customization is needed, do it using LlamaIndex tools (extend LlamaIndex classes).
summary: Replace the custom HierarchicalPGRetriever (hand-rolled Cypher BaseRetriever) with native LlamaIndex retrieval. The blocker (confirmed in installed source): native VectorContextRetriever uses Neo4jPropertyGraphStore.vector_query, which searches the __Entity__ vector index — but our retrievable units are :Chunk nodes in a separate ema_chunk_embedding index, and it ignores a supplied vector_store when the store reports supports_vector_queries=True.
recommended: Option 1 — native VectorContextRetriever + a thin Neo4jPropertyGraphStore subclass that points vector_query at the chunk index (customization via a LlamaIndex tool); reuses the built graph (no rebuild). Alternative Option 2 — rebuild to VectorStoreIndex + Neo4jVectorStore + AutoMergingRetriever (most-blessed, costly).
